scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server

scripts.test:db: tsx --test tests/adaptive-causal.test.ts tests/behavioural-integration.test.ts tests/career-discovery-complete-entry.test.ts tests/career-discovery-no-schema-when-off.test.ts tests/onet-derive-competency.test.ts tests/onet-onto-weight-bridge.test.ts tests/progression-outcomes-measured.test.ts tests/psychometrics.test.ts tests/role-title-crosswalk.test.ts tests/talent-matching-job-crosswalk.test.ts tests/workforce-os.edge.test.ts tests/workforce-os.test.ts
